info.name: AI Assessments API
info.description: Current Postman collection for the AI Assessments app. Includes health/docs, LDAP/JWT auth, all assessment workflows, task/results APIs, proxy render endpoints, and native dataset/document management.

request.description: Public health endpoint.

response.name: Healthy
response.body:
{
  "status": "ok",
  "ragflow_url": "http://localhost:9380",
  "base_path": "/",
  "auth_enabled": true,
  "ldap_enabled": true,
  "auth_type": "ldap",
  "otel_enabled": false,
  "otel_endpoint": null,
  "log_file_enabled": false,
  "log_dir": null
}

request.description: FastAPI OpenAPI document.
FastAPI Swagger UI.
FastAPI ReDoc UI.
Authenticate against LDAP and receive access and refresh tokens.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access/refresh pair.
Validate the current access token.
Upload questions and evidence in one call.

formdata.description: Add one entry per evidence file

request.description: Reuse one or more existing dataset ids.
Create a task and wait for document uploads.

response.name: Created

request.description: Upload one or more evidence documents to an existing session.
Queue the session for parsing and assessment.
Paginated list of all tasks.
List tasks that reference a dataset id.
Current status and pipeline progress for one task.
Delete a task and its local results plus associated upstream chat and datasets.
Queue a full task retry using the stored workflow configuration, with optional chat/dataset overrides.
Retry only the questions currently marked failed for a completed or failed task.
Audit/debug events for a task.
Paginated results with packaged reference metadata and proxy/render links.

response.name: Results

request.description: Download results as XLSX.
Locate existing uploaded documents by content hash.
Fetch an image chunk through the assessment service.
Fetch the original source document through the assessment service.
Render docx/xlsx/xlsm/pptx into HTML for browser display.
Upload documents directly into an existing dataset and optionally trigger parsing.
List datasets visible to the configured RAGFlow API key.
Delete one or more datasets by id.
List documents in a dataset with normalized parse status.
Delete one or more document ids from a dataset.
Example of the generic native passthrough to upstream RAGFlow /api/v1/* endpoints.
